activities_projects.title: Focal Length Determination Using u-v Graph
activities_projects.objective: Find focal length of concave mirror using graphical method
steps: Take 8-10 readings of u and v for real images
Find intercepts, calculate f from 1/f = intercept
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Uses graphical analysis for accurate focal length
activities_projects.evaluation: Graph quality, calculation, error analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Error Analysis in Lens Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Perform lens experiment with error propagation
steps: Measure u, v with least count
Find percentage error in u, v, f

activities_projects.title: Critical Angle Determination for Glass-Air
activities_projects.objective: Measure critical angle using semicircular glass block
steps: Shine laser from curved side at increasing angles
Note angle when emergent ray grazes surface (TIR starts)
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Determines critical angle and refractive index experimentally
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of C, μ calculation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Magnification and Power Numerical Project
activities_projects.objective: Solve complex numericals involving combination of optics
steps: Solve 8-10 advanced problems (mirror + lens system, power combo, defect correction)
Present solutions with steps and units

activities_projects.title: Prism Dispersion Mini-Project
activities_projects.objective: Demonstrate and explain dispersion through prism
materials: Laser or white light source (torch + slit)
steps: Observe spectrum, measure deviation angles for colors
Explain wavelength dependence of refractive index

activities_projects.title: Optical Fibre Model and TIR Application
activities_projects.objective: Build and explain optical fibre using water jet or acrylic rod
materials: Clear acrylic rod or curved plastic tube
steps: Direct laser into rod at angle for TIR

activities_projects.title: Human Eye Defects Correction Simulation
steps: Measure least distance of distinct vision
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies lens formula to eye defects

activities_projects.title: Scattering of Light Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Demonstrate blue sky and red sunset using milk solution
steps: Shine torch, observe blue from side, red from back

activities_projects.title: Derivation and Application of Lens Maker's Formula
activities_projects.objective: Derive lens maker's formula and verify
steps: Use known μ and R values to calculate f
Compare with experimental f of a lens
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands theoretical basis of lens formula

activities_projects.title: Innovation: Simple Solar Concentrator
activities_projects.objective: Design a small solar concentrator using concave mirror
materials: Large concave mirror or foil reflector
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies concave mirror properties to renewable energy
